violations.text: The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of (proper food labeling, cold holding, or cooling parameters for TCS foods). The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The front hand wash sink was observed being used as a coffee dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Portuguese linguica and ham, egg, and cheese croissant were observed held at 70 and 68 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Bread, cheese, sandwiches, and pizza strips packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. All items lacking labels were moved to back of house. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
FRP boards (used as lining for storage shelves) located in the back food storage area were not in good repair (observed heavily cracked with pieces missing). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

An employee was observed rinsing utensils in the front hand wash sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Employee instructed to wash and rinse all utensils and equipment in the three-compartment sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Pizza strips, calzones, chicken sandwiches, and pork filled pastry were observed held at 52-57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Inspector determined that all items were placed out of temperature control within an hour. All the items were moved to refrigeration units to cool back down to 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Several items such as, cheese, bread, and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Inspector instructed employee to move all unlabeled product away from grab-and-go area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
FRP boards (used as lining for storage shelves) located in the back food storage area were not in good repair (observed heavily cracked with pieces missing). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The ceiling in the back prep and storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Dishes and utensils were observed in the front and back of the house hand-washing sinks. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
A small container of donut flour was observed adulterated due to the presence of insects within it. PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Several items such as cheese, bread, and sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
FRP boards (used as lining for storage shelves) located in the back food storage area was not in good repair (observed heavily cracked with pieces missing). New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The ceiling in the back prep and storage area is in poor repair (observed with peeling/chipping paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Pizza was observed held at ambient room temperature. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

Breads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023
The door to the rest room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
